name: @the-agency/pi-spec-kit
description: A [Pi](https://github.com/mariozechner/pi-coding-agent) package that integrates GitHub's [Spec Kit](https://github.com/github/spec-kit) in a Pi-native way, to support a spec-driven development workflow for planning and building features in a software repo
